input.background:
Identify whether the variables below are continuous or discrete:

\begin{tabular}{|l|l|l|}
\hline Variable & Continuous & Discrete \\
\hline Amount of rainfall in a day (mm) & & \\
\hline Number of people with an interest in environmental issues & & \\
\hline Percentage of leaves on a tree displaying fungal infection & & \\
\hline The concentration of cadmium in roadside soils & & \\
\hline Type of site (either reclaimed or not) & & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
input.question: Determine whether 'The concentration of cadmium in roadside soils' is continuous or discrete.

meta_info.book: Using Statistics to Understand the Environment
